title: Validate Nx Wiring Executor
description: Validates that the webpieces validators are wired into the build via nx.json targetDefaults dependsOn, so a build cannot pass while running zero validators.

requiredDeps.description: Target names that each compile executor's dependsOn must include. Defaults: architecture:validate-complete, validate-no-file-import-cycles.

compileExecutors.description: Compile executors to require wiring on, but only when actually used in the project graph. Defaults: @nx/js:tsc, @angular/build:application.
